use_cases: Collecting multiple boolean selections in forms for user preferences and settings
Filtering data in dashboards or e-commerce product filters
Multi-select options for survey questions or quizzes
Toggling multiple features or options in settings panels
ai_summary: A checkbox group component for collecting multiple selections from users in forms. This atomic input component supports binary toggles across multiple options, commonly used in settings interfaces, filtering systems, consent forms, and multi-select surveys. Designed for cross-platform use with responsive layouts.
